summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enhanced Jam Connexion features including musician profiles with band info, friend system, venue subscriptions, jam/concert events, planning slots, and application system. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), frontend core functionality operational with minor authentication flow issue.

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard accessible without proper authentication - direct URL access bypasses login

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and role selection buttons
Registration forms accessible for both musicians and venues
API: POST /api/auth/register - enhanced musician registration with band info
API: POST /api/auth/register - venue registration with trial subscription
API: POST /api/musicians - enhanced musician profile creation with pseudo, age, band info, concerts
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication flow - dashboard routes should redirect to login when user is not authenticated. Currently /musician and /venue routes are accessible without proper authentication.
